name: compumedics.com.au AND neuromedicalsupplies.com
message: A global leader in the development, manufacture and commercialisation of diagnostic technologies for the sleep, brain and ultrasonic blood-flow monitoring applications.Compumedics Limited (ASX: CMP) is a medical device company involved in the development, manufacture and commercialisation of diagnostics technology for the sleep, brain and ultrasonic blood-flow monitoring applications.
